aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Allied Heating & Cooling due to a lack of structured content and conversational authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC services like AC repair and installation.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can benefit from more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for detailed service listings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best HVAC repair in Arvada' and 'emergency AC services near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema with common customer questions and detailed answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting NATE certification and emergency services to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise unmistakably visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, Allied Heating & Cooling misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and FAQ content rank higher in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models cite your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to claim your share of voice-driven traffic.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Arvada
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
